meaning: n.厚度,浓度,稠密,(一)层,混浊
examples: The size of the fish will determine the thickness of the steaks.
The trousers have double thickness knee panels for extra protection.
What's the thickness of the wall?
The team found a link between body mass, skin thickness and how a child was born.
But the vagaries of the wood's thickness yielded a cabinet with room for only two.
